title: React Native Mobile App - Comprehensive Technical Optimization Plan

phases.name: Foundation & Tooling Setup
phases.description: Establish Redux Toolkit infrastructure, enhance TypeScript strictness, and prepare the codebase for large-scale refactoring.
objectives: Install Redux Toolkit and react-redux dependencies
Enable strict TypeScript configuration with noImplicitAny
Create Redux store structure template (slices, async thunks, selectors)
Set up test utilities and Redux testing infrastructure
Create feature-first directory structure template
Document Redux/feature structure conventions in .github/instructions/

tasks.title: Install Redux Toolkit & related dependencies
tasks.description: Add @reduxjs/toolkit, react-redux, redux-persist, and supporting types to package.json. Update jest.config.js to handle Redux modules.

tasks.title: Enable strict TypeScript configuration
tasks.description: Update tsconfig.json with strict mode, noImplicitAny: true, noImplicitReturns: true, exactly match project spec requirements.
validationCriteria: tsc --noEmit runs without errors (after type fixes in later phases)

tasks.title: Create Redux store template & structure
tasks.description: Establish src/store/ with rootReducer.ts, store.ts, middleware configuration. Create template slices, create hooks (useAppDispatch, useAppSelector). Document in .github/instructions/redux.instructions.md.

tasks.title: Create test utilities for Redux
tasks.description: Add src/utils/testing/reduxTestUtils.ts with custom renderWithRedux(), setupTestStore(), mock selectors for testing Redux-connected components.
validationCriteria: renderWithRedux() helper renders components with Redux provider
setupTestStore() creates isolated Redux store per test
Redux middleware properly configured for testing

tasks.title: Create feature directory structure template
tasks.description: Document and create sample feature folder structure: src/features/{featureName}/{screens,components,hooks,services,store,types,utils,navigation}/. Add create-feature script or documentation.
validationCriteria: Feature template documented in architecture instructions
Sample feature structure created and committed
Developers have clear guidelines for feature creation

tasks.title: Update test jest.config.js for Redux and features
tasks.description: Extend moduleNameMapper with feature aliases (@/features/...), update setupFilesAfterEnv to configure Redux testing utilities.
validationCriteria: Test suite runs without path resolution errors

risks: Redux DevTools extension may need debugging in test environment
TypeScript strictness may reveal existing type issues (expected, handled in Phase 4)
phases.rollbackStrategy: All changes are additive; can revert package.json and tsconfig.json if needed. No application logic affected.

phases.name: Redux State Management Migration
phases.description: Migrate from Zustand to Redux Toolkit for auth and cart stores. Implement thunks for async operations, selectors for efficient access.
objectives: Migrate authStore (Zustand) → authSlice.ts + authThunks (async operations)
Migrate cartStore (Zustand) → cartSlice.ts + selectors
Update axios interceptor to use Redux dispatch/selector for token management
Create auth and cart selectors (useAppSelector hooks) for component usage
Implement token refresh mechanism in axios interceptor
Update all component imports: useAuthStore → useAppSelector/useAppDispatch
Keep Zustand as peer dependency until Phase 5 to avoid breaking changes

tasks.title: Create authSlice.ts with Redux Toolkit
tasks.description: Convert authStore.ts to authSlice.ts using createSlice. Define initial state (isLoggedIn, token, user, loading), reducers (setUser, clearAuth). Move side effects to thunks in next task.
validationCriteria: Actions (setUser, clearAuth, etc.) are generated by createSlice
Redux state shape matches Zustand structure for easier migration
Initial state loads from AsyncStorage (handled by thunk in task-2-3)

tasks.title: Create authThunks.ts for async auth operations
tasks.description: Create async thunks: loginThunk(email, password), logoutThunk(), loadTokenThunk(), loadUserThunk(). These handle API calls, token storage in EncryptedStorage, and error handling.
validationCriteria: loginThunk calls API, stores token in EncryptedStorage, dispatches success/failure
logoutThunk clears EncryptedStorage and Redux state
loadTokenThunk runs on app initialization, restores session
All thunks handle errors without exposing backend details
Loading states managed via pending/fulfilled/rejected actions

tasks.title: Create auth selectors & custom hooks
tasks.description: Create src/store/selectors/authSelectors.ts with selectUser, selectToken, selectIsLoggedIn, selectAuthLoading. Create custom hooks: useAuth(), useAuthDispatch() for easy component access.
validationCriteria: Selectors memoized and prevent unnecessary re-renders
useAuth() hook returns { user, isLoggedIn, loading, dispatch actions }
TypeScript types inferred correctly from Redux state

tasks.title: Update axios interceptor with Redux token refresh
tasks.description: Refactor src/utils/axios.ts to use Redux getState/dispatch. Implement token refresh mechanism: on 401, attempt refresh, retry request, or redirect to login. Remove direct Zustand dependency.
validationCriteria: Interceptor reads token from Redux state
On 401, attempts token refresh before failing
Refresh token stored safely in EncryptedStorage
Failed refresh redirects to login/clears auth state
Error responses don't leak backend details

tasks.title: Create cartSlice.ts with Redux Toolkit
tasks.description: Convert cartStore.ts to cartSlice.ts. Define initial state (items, total, itemCount), reducers (addItem, removeItem, updateQuantity, clearCart). Handle computed values via selectors.
validationCriteria: All reducers handle Immer updates correctly

tasks.title: Create cart selectors & custom hooks
tasks.description: Create src/store/selectors/cartSelectors.ts with selectCartItems, selectCartTotal, selectItemCount. Create useCart() hook. Ensure computed values (total, count) are memoized.
validationCriteria: useCart() hook provides dispatch actions + selectors

tasks.title: Migrate LoginScreen to use Redux
tasks.description: Update LoginScreen.tsx: replace useAuthStore with useAppDispatch + loginThunk. Update error handling to properly type errors. Test login/logout flow.
validationCriteria: LoginScreen dispatches loginThunk on form submit
Loading state reflects Redux loading boolean
Error messages properly typed and safe
Navigation to home screen after login

tasks.title: Migrate CartScreen/CheckoutScreen to use Redux
tasks.description: Update CartScreen.tsx, CheckoutScreen.tsx: replace useCartStore with useAppDispatch + cartSelectors. Handle checkout state management.
validationCriteria: Cart operations dispatch correct Redux actions
Selectors properly display cart items and totals
Checkout flow manages order state in Redux

tasks.title: Implement Redux persistence (optional but recommended)
tasks.description: Add redux-persist middleware to persist auth token and cart state to AsyncStorage. Configure whitelist of reducers to persist.
validationCriteria: Redux state persists across app restarts
Auth token is available on cold start

tasks.title: Verify Redux migration & remove Zustand
tasks.description: Run all screens, verify auth/cart flows work. Check for remaining Zustand imports. Remove zustand from package.json only after all tests pass.
validationCriteria: All screens function correctly with Redux
No Zustand imports remain in codebase

risks: Breaking changes during migration may require careful branching strategy
Token refresh logic may need API endpoint not yet implemented
Redux persistence may conflict with existing AsyncStorage usage - coordinate with Phase 4
phases.rollbackStrategy: Keep Zustand stores in separate branch. Can revert to Zustand if Redux migration fails. Use feature flags to control store usage per screen.

phases.name: Architecture Refactoring to Feature-First
phases.description: Reorganize codebase from flat src/screens/, src/components/ to feature-based src/features/{auth,cart,product,order}/. Implement barrel exports and feature-scoped navigation.
objectives: Create feature folders: src/features/{auth,product,cart,order,profile}
Move screens, components, hooks, services, store, types, utils into respective features
Create barrel exports (index.ts) per feature
Refactor src/components/ to contain only shared reusable UI components
Update navigation to be feature-scoped and properly typed
Update all import paths throughout codebase
Remove old flat directory structure

tasks.title: Create feature directory structure & move auth feature
tasks.description: Create src/features/auth/ with screens/, components/, hooks/, services/, store/, types/, utils/ subdirectories. Move LoginScreen, LoginForm, useAuth, authThunks, authSlice, auth types. Create barrel export (index.ts).
validationCriteria: Auth feature folder created with all required subdirectories
All auth-related files moved and paths updated
No import path errors after refactoring
Auth screens and components still function

tasks.title: Move cart feature to feature-first structure
tasks.description: Create src/features/cart/ and move CartScreen, CartItem component, useCart, cartSlice, cart services and types. Create barrel export.
validationCriteria: Cart feature folder created and organized
All cart files moved with updated imports
CartScreen and cart operations function correctly

tasks.title: Move product/catalog feature to feature-first structure
tasks.description: Create src/features/product/ and move HomeScreen, ProductDetailScreen, ProductCard, product services, product types. Create barrel export.

tasks.title: Move order/checkout features to feature-first structure
tasks.description: Create src/features/order/ and move CheckoutScreen, OrderHistoryScreen, order services, order types. Move src/features/checkout/ if exists. Create barrel export.
validationCriteria: Order feature created with proper structure
Checkout and order history screens work
Order state management integrated with Redux

tasks.title: Move profile feature to feature-first structure
tasks.description: Create src/features/profile/ and move ProfileScreen, ProfileEdit, Profile component, useAuth hooks, profile services and types. Create barrel export.
validationCriteria: API calls for profile updates function

tasks.title: Refactor src/components/ to contain only shared UI components
tasks.description: Move feature-specific components into src/features/. Keep only truly reusable UI components in src/components/ (Layout, ScreenHeader, shared form components). Create subdirectories: ui/, layout/, forms/.
validationCriteria: src/components/ contains only generic reusable components
Shared layout and UI components properly organized

tasks.title: Create feature-scoped navigation structure
tasks.description: Create src/navigation/ with RootNavigator.tsx that composes feature navigators. Each feature's src/features/{name}/navigation/XyzNavigator.tsx handles its screens. Update navigation type definitions.
validationCriteria: Feature navigators properly typed with RootStackParamList
Bottom tab and stack navigation properly structured

tasks.title: Update all import paths across codebase
tasks.description: Use global search/replace to update all import statements from old paths (src/screens/, src/store/) to new feature paths (src/features/{name}/screens/, src/features/{name}/store/). Verify no broken imports.

tasks.title: Remove old flat directory structure
tasks.description: Delete src/screens/, src/store/ (old zustand stores), src/components/ (feature-specific ones already moved). Create .gitkeep files in feature directories to preserve structure.
validationCriteria: Git history preserved for old files

tasks.title: Verify architecture refactoring & run all features
tasks.description: Test all screens, navigation, state management. Verify no circular dependencies. Run linter and TypeScript compiler. Update architecture documentation.
validationCriteria: All screens load and navigate correctly

risks: Large refactoring may introduce import path errors - careful testing required
Circular dependencies may appear between features - need strict architectural rules
Navigation type definitions may need careful coordination
Parallel work on multiple features may cause merge conflicts
phases.rollbackStrategy: Keep old directory structure in separate branch. Use git worktrees to parallelize refactoring safely. Revert commits grouped by feature if issues arise.

phases.name: Code Quality & TypeScript Strictness
phases.description: Remove all 'any' types, add proper error typing, implement validation layer, standardize error handling, and ensure theme constants are used throughout.
objectives: Replace all 'any' types with proper TypeScript types
Implement proper error typing (AxiosError, custom error types)
Create validation utilities for form inputs and API responses
Standardize error handling across screens and services
Create custom error boundary component
Replace all hardcoded colors/spacing with theme constants
Add JSDoc comments for public APIs
Enable stricter TypeScript checks (noImplicitReturns, noUnusedLocals, etc.)

tasks.title: Create error types and error handling utilities
tasks.description: Create src/types/error.types.ts with AppError, ApiError, ValidationError. Create src/utils/errorHandling.ts with formatError(), isAxiosError(), getErrorMessage(). Update axios interceptor to throw typed errors.
validationCriteria: Error types properly defined and exported
formatError() safely converts any error to AppError
No error details leak to user interface
Axios error handling uses typed errors

tasks.title: Replace all 'any' types in error handlers
tasks.description: Audit screens (LoginScreen, HomeScreen, CartScreen, CheckoutScreen, ProfileScreen, OrderHistoryScreen) and replace 'catch (err: any)' with proper error types. Use errorHandling utilities.
validationCriteria: No remaining 'any' in error catch blocks
Error logging doesn't expose sensitive info

tasks.title: Replace icon type 'any' with proper types
tasks.description: In ProductDetailScreen and other places using MaterialCommunityIcons, replace icon name type assertions with proper IconProps interface. Create src/types/icons.types.ts if needed.
validationCriteria: Icon names properly typed as IconNameProp
No 'as any' type assertions for icons

tasks.title: Create validation utilities for forms & API responses
tasks.description: Create src/utils/validation/ with email.ts, password.ts, required.ts. Create src/utils/apiValidation.ts for response validation. Add stricter typing for form data.

tasks.title: Audit and remove all other 'any' type usages
tasks.description: Use grep to find remaining 'any' type usages. Replace with proper types or document with comments justifying necessity. Run 'tsc --noEmit' to verify.
validationCriteria: Grep search for 'any' returns 0 results (or documented)
tsc --noEmit passes without implicit any errors
TypeScript strict mode enabled and passing

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded colors/spacing with theme constants
tasks.description: Audit all components for hardcoded colors (e.g., '#f0f0f0', '#007AFF'), spacing values. Replace with constants from src/constants/theme.ts. Update theme.ts if missing colors.
validationCriteria: No hardcoded color/size values in code

tasks.title: Create custom error boundary component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ErrorBoundary.tsx as a React Error Boundary. Wrap screens and features with error handling. Log errors safely without exposing internals.
validationCriteria: Error boundary catches React render errors
App doesn't crash on component errors

tasks.title: Add JSDoc comments for public APIs
tasks.description: Add JSDoc comments to all exported functions, hooks, types, components. Especially for src/store/selectors/, src/hooks/, src/services/. Include @param, @returns, @throws.
validationCriteria: All public exports have JSDoc comments

tasks.title: Enable additional strict TypeScript checks
tasks.description: Update tsconfig.json: enable noImplicitReturns, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, exactOptionalPropertyTypes. Fix any compilation errors.
validationCriteria: All functions have explicit return types

tasks.title: Verify code quality improvements & run linter
tasks.description: Run eslint and TypeScript compiler. Review all changes for consistency. Update .eslintrc if needed to enforce these standards. Document code quality guidelines.

risks: Strict TypeScript checks may be initially blocky but are essential
Theme migration may uncover design inconsistencies
Some 'any' types may be difficult to properly type (document with comments)
phases.rollbackStrategy: This phase is mostly additive (strict rules, new types). Can disable strict TypeScript checks if needed, but not recommended. Type additions can be incrementally committed.

phases.name: Performance Optimization & Test Coverage Expansion
phases.description: Implement memoization, FlatList optimizations, image optimization. Expand test coverage from 25% to 70% with proper unit, integration, and E2E test structure.
objectives: Add React.memo() to list items and expensive components
Optimize FlatList with keyExtractor, getItemLayout, maxToRenderPerBatch
Implement image optimization (lazy loading, progressive JPEG, responsive sizes)
Add bundle analysis and code splitting for features
Increase test coverage: 40+ unit tests, 15+ integration tests, 5+ E2E scenarios
Implement E2E tests for auth, cart, checkout flows using native testing
Add performance monitoring (console warnings for slow renders)
Document performance best practices

tasks.title: Identify and memoize list item components
tasks.description: Audit ProductCard, CartItem, OrderItem components. Wrap with React.memo(). Add custom comparison functions if needed. Implement keyExtractor callbacks.
validationCriteria: List item components wrapped with React.memo()
Custom comparison only if complex props

tasks.title: Optimize FlatList components for performance
tasks.description: In HomeScreen (products list) and CartScreen (cart items), implement: keyExtractor (memoized callback), getItemLayout, maxToRenderPerBatch, updateCellsBatchingPeriod, removeClippedSubviews.
validationCriteria: getItemLayout implemented for known item heights
maxToRenderPerBatch tuned (default 10, adjust for large lists)

tasks.title: Implement image optimization & lazy loading
tasks.description: Audit product and profile images. Implement: lazy loading via react-native-fast-image or conditional rendering, responsive image sizes, caching headers. Create src/components/ui/OptimizedImage.tsx.
validationCriteria: Images lazy loaded (not all loaded immediately)
Responsive images for different screen sizes
No layout shift when images load

tasks.title: Add useMemo/useCallback optimizations to complex components
tasks.description: Audit LoginForm, ProductDetailScreen, CheckoutScreen for expensive calculations/callbacks. Add useMemo for StyleSheet combinations, useCallback for event handlers passed as props.
validationCriteria: Event handlers wrapped in useCallback when passed to children

tasks.title: Create comprehensive unit test suite (target 40+ tests)
tasks.description: Expand __tests__/components/, __tests__/screens/, __tests__/store/. Add tests for: auth thunks, cart selectors, product fetching, form validation, error handling. 70% line coverage target.
validationCriteria: All Redux slices and thunks tested

tasks.title: Create integration tests (target 15+ tests)
tasks.description: Create __tests__/integration/ with tests for: auth flow (login → navigate), cart flow (add → checkout), profile flow (edit → save). Use Redux test utilities.

tasks.title: Create E2E test scenarios (target 5+ scenarios)
tasks.description: Create __tests__/e2e/ with critical user flows: login/logout, browse products, add to cart, checkout (with mock API). Use React Native Testing Library with mocked API.
validationCriteria: API mocked with MSW or custom hooks

tasks.title: Set up performance monitoring & profiling
tasks.description: Add console.time/performance markers for screen transitions, API calls. Add React Native Performance Monitor. Document slow renders. Consider Sentry or similar for prod monitoring.

tasks.title: Implement code splitting for features (optional but recommended)
tasks.description: Use React Navigation lazy loading. Load feature screens on demand: lazy(() => import('@/features/profile/screens/...')). Measure bundle impact.

tasks.title: Final verification: performance & test coverage
tasks.description: Run 'npm test' with coverage report. Verify 70% overall, 80%+ for critical paths (auth, cart). Run performance profiler. Document results and improvements achieved.

risks: Test coverage 25%→70% is significant work, may need 2-3 sprints
Performance optimizations may be premature without profiling - profile first
Image optimization complexity depends on image source (API, local, etc.)
E2E tests may be flaky if API/network mocking not properly configured
phases.rollbackStrategy: Test coverage and optimizations are low-risk. Can revert specific test files if needed. Performance optimizations can be toggled via feature flags.

recommendedSequence: Phase 1-4 Parallel: TypeScript Strictness (Days 3-12 in parallel)
Phase 5: Performance & Testing (Days 14-26 or next sprint)

parallelizationStrategy.frontend: Phase 1 tasks (tooling) can run in parallel. Phase 2 auth and cart migrations can run in parallel. Phase 3 features can be refactored in parallel (auth, product, cart, order, profile).
parallelizationStrategy.backend: None required - API endpoints should already exist. Coordinate token refresh endpoint if needed.
parallelizationStrategy.testing: Phase 5 can start after Phase 4 core code quality is done. Unit tests can be added incrementally throughout phases.

migration_safety.backward_compatibility: Phase 1-4 maintain working app throughout. Use feature branches for large refactors. Test thoroughly before merging.
migration_safety.rollback_strategy: Each phase has git checkpoints. Keep Zustand as optional peer dependency until fully migrated. Use feature flags for Redux toggle.
migration_safety.testing_gates: Require 1) TypeScript compilation passes, 2) All screens functional, 3) Navigation working, 4) All tests passing before moving to next phase.
migration_safety.deployment_strategy: Deploy phases incrementally: Phase 1 (tooling only), Phase 2 (Redux), Phase 3 (architecture), Phase 4 (quality), Phase 5 (performance).

critical_success_factors: Strict TypeScript configuration enforced early (Phase 1) and maintained throughout
Redux store design clean and testable before migrating screens (Phase 2)
Architecture refactoring complete before scaling features (Phase 3)
Code quality standards enforced via CI/CD (Phase 4)
Test coverage and performance measurable and tracked (Phase 5)

after.performance: Smooth scrolling, optimized renders, lazy loading
